step_rationale: Mitochondrial tRNA synthetase; postoperative AF is arrhythmia, not atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: WARS2 is a mitochondrial aminoacyl-tRNA synthetase; variants predict postoperative atrial fibrillation, a systemic electrophysiologic phenotype.

references.title: Differential Expression of mRNA in Peripheral Blood Mononuclear Cells May Predict Postoperative Atrial Fibrillation in Coronary Artery Bypass Surgery Patients.
